content.method: Use the study or pilot design stated in the migrated v1 research agenda.
content.question: Official KIFIR/Oktatási Hivatal admissions statistics disaggregated by track type and maintainer, cross-referenced against cohort-size trends, to isolate the policy-driven component of contraction from the purely demographic one (S5).
content.why_it_matters: It can change the comparison of transformation choices.
